p1.description: Population proportion for group 1, used directly in the sample size formula

p2.description: Population proportion for group 2, used directly in the sample size formula

alpha.description: Significance level (α) for the two-sided test, used to determine z_{1-α/2} = 1.96 in the sample size formula

power.description: Statistical power (1-β) of the test, used to determine z_{1-β} = 1.282 in the sample size formula
